description_long: This is a sleek, two-door sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a convertible roof. The body is painted in a vibrant pink color, complemented by black-tinted windows and a dark windshield. The front features a wide grille, aggressive air intakes, and sculpted hood vents, while the rear is streamlined with subtle taillights and a smooth bumper. The side view reveals stylish, multi-spoke wheels and prominent side vents behind the front wheels. The interior appears to have two bucket seats and a minimalist dashboard, typical of high-performance vehicles. The overall design emphasizes speed, luxury, and modern aesthetics, making it suitable for urban environments and upscale neighborhoods.
description: A vibrant pink, convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black-tinted windows, and stylish multi-spoke wheels. Its design is sleek and modern, emphasizing speed and luxury.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, sculpted hood vents, and black-tinted windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the convertible roof, two bucket seats, and multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth bumper, subtle taillights, and open interior.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the side vents, wheels, and convertible seating.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a dark finish
